title: 美国历史：移民与国家构建
source: 考研英语一 2015 翻译真题
originalEN:
This movement, driven by powerful and diverse motivations, built a nation out of a wilderness and, by its nature, shaped the character and destiny of an uncharted continent.

The United States is the product of two principal forces — the immigration of European peoples with their varied ideas, customs, and national characteristics and the impact of a new country which modified these traits.

But, the force of geographic conditions peculiar to America, the interplay of the varied national groups upon one another, and the sheer difficulty of maintaining old-world ways in a raw, new continent caused significant changes.

The first shiploads of immigrants bound for the territory which is now the United States crossed the Atlantic more than a hundred years after the 15th-and-16th-century explorations of North America.

The virgin forest with its richness and variety of trees was a veritable real treasure-house which extended from Maine all the way down to Georgia.
referenceTranslation:
在各种强大而多样化的动机推动下，这场移民运动在荒野中建立了一个国家，并且就其本质而言，塑造了一片未知大陆的性格与命运。

美国是两股主要力量的产物：一是欧洲各民族带来了各自不同的思想、风俗和民族特征，二是这个新国家在改变这些特征后所产生的影响。

但是，美国特有的地理条件、不同民族群体之间的相互影响，以及在这片原始的新大陆上维持旧有生活方式的巨大困难，都引起了深刻的改变。

在15至16世纪对北美洲的探险过去一百多年之后，第一批满载移民的船只横渡大西洋，驶向了如今被称为美国的这片土地。

这片原始森林树木种类繁多，是一座真正的宝库，从缅因州一直向南延伸到佐治亚州。

segments.en: This movement, driven by powerful and diverse motivations, built a nation out of a wilderness and, by its nature, shaped the character and destiny of an uncharted continent.
segments.contextZH: 概述移民运动的历史意义

segments.en: The United States is the product of two principal forces — the immigration of European peoples with their varied ideas, customs, and national characteristics and the impact of a new country which modified these traits.

But, the force of geographic conditions peculiar to America, the interplay of the varied national groups upon one another, and the sheer difficulty of maintaining old-world ways in a raw, new continent caused significant changes.
The first shiploads of immigrants bound for the territory which is now the United States crossed the Atlantic more than a hundred years after the 15th-and-16th-century explorations of North America.
The virgin forest with its richness and variety of trees was a veritable real treasure-house which extended from Maine all the way down to Georgia.

title: 心理健康的内在力量
source: 考研英语一 2016 翻译真题
originalEN:
We don't have to learn how to be mentally healthy; it is built into us in the same way that our bodies know how to heal a cut or mend a broken bone.

Our mental health doesn't really go anywhere; like the sun behind a cloud, it can be temporarily hidden from view, but it is fully capable of being restored in an instant.

Mental health allows us to view others with sympathy if they are having troubles, with kindness if they are in pain, and with unconditional love no matter who they are.

Although mental health is the cure-all for living our lives, it is perfectly ordinary as you will see that it has been there to direct you through all your difficult decisions.

As you will come to see, knowing that mental health is always available and knowing to trust it allow us to slow down to the moment and live life happily.
referenceTranslation:
我们不必刻意学习如何保持心理健康；它与生俱来，正如我们的身体知道如何愈合伤口、修复断骨一样。

心理健康并不会真正离开我们；正如乌云背后的太阳，它可能暂时被遮挡，但完全可以在瞬间恢复光芒。

心理健康使我们在他人遇到麻烦时给予同情，在他人痛苦时给予善意，而且无论对方是谁，都能给予无条件的爱。

尽管心理健康是我们生活中的万灵药，但它又极其普通，因为你会发现它一直都在那里，指引你度过所有艰难的决定。

你会逐渐明白，懂得心理健康始终伴随左右并且信任它，能让我们放慢生活节奏，活在当下，幸福生活。

segments.en: We don't have to learn how to be mentally healthy; it is built into us in the same way that our bodies know how to heal a cut or mend a broken bone.
segments.contextZH: 心理健康与生俱来的本质
keyPoints: the same way that定语从句

segments.en: Our mental health doesn't really go anywhere; like the sun behind a cloud, it can be temporarily hidden from view, but it is fully capable of being restored in an instant.
Mental health allows us to view others with sympathy if they are having troubles, with kindness if they are in pain, and with unconditional love no matter who they are.
Although mental health is the cure-all for living our lives, it is perfectly ordinary as you will see that it has been there to direct you through all your difficult decisions.
As you will come to see, knowing that mental health is always available and knowing to trust it allow us to slow down to the moment and live life happily.
segments.contextZH: 信任心理健康带来的改变
